code: import React,{useState,useEffect}from'react';import ItemEntryForm from'./ItemEntryForm';import{fetchTransactions,createTransaction}from'../services/api';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";function BillingScreen(){const[transactions,setTransactions]=useState([]);const[tableNumber,setTableNumber]=useState(1);useEffect(()=>{loadTransactions();},[tableNumber]);const loadTransactions=async()=>{const data=await fetchTransactions(tableNumber);setTransactions(data);};const handleAddTransaction=async transaction=>{await createTransaction(transaction);loadTransactions();};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h1",{children:"Billing Screen"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("label",{children:["Table Number:",/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{type:"number",value:tableNumber,onChange:e=>setTableNumber(e.target.value)})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(ItemEntryForm,{onAddTransaction:handleAddTransaction,tableNumber:tableNumber}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("ul",{children:transactions.map(t=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("li",{children:[t.item_name," - ",t.quantity," x ",t.price," = ",t.quantity*t.price]},t.id))})]});}export default BillingScreen;
